title: ECDH, X25519, and Authenticated Key Agreement · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent team receives different assets, adversaries, data sizes, cryptoperiods, interoperability duties, availability limits, and compliance claims and transfers ecdh, x25519, and authenticated key agreement into a new authenticated X25519 key-agreement transcript. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of authenticated X25519 key-agreement transcript with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Use supported ECDH curves through Go interfaces with private/public key separation, strict parsing, and shared-secret error handling.
Select X25519 or approved NIST curves from protocol, hardware, compliance, interoperability, and implementation constraints.
Feed the ECDH result and full context into a labeled KDF rather than using raw shared bytes directly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Ecdh Contract
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab cryptographic engineering team handles case 2550 during a replicated device restart. Build deterministic Go evidence to authenticate and transcript-bind an ephemeral X25519 or approved ECDH exchange; preserve accessible status, non-color meaning, keyboard operation, error recovery, and secret-safe diagnostics; then swap the role, tenant, recipient, algorithm, or context and prove domain separation. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Ecdh Contract.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for use supported ecdh curves through go interfaces with private/public key separation, strict parsing, and shared-secret error handling. For Cryptography and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Crypto Go Ecdh Contract, keep Crypto Go Ecdh Contract connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
